projects.title: ContribHub
projects.description: Dug into an open source codebase used by developers worldwide and overhauled the search experience — keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and interactive feedback.
projects.alt: Screenshot of the ContribHub web app, including the search bar I worked on.

projects.title: KnightLife
projects.description: A concept mobile app for UCF students who are tired of missing out. Find events, discover clubs, actually know what's going on.

projects.description: Tell it your goal and your deadline. It'll tell you what it takes to get there.

projects.title: WikiRoulette
projects.description: One click. One random Wikipedia article. For when you have nowhere to be and everywhere to go.
